scene_description.description: What Vita is doing in this panel, related to the article topic (2-3 sentences)

background.description: Background setting: gym, kitchen, lab, park, etc. Include key environmental details

pose.description: Vita's body pose and action (e.g. 'power stance with hands on hips', 'mid-squat holding dumbbells')

expression.description: Vita's facial expression (e.g. 'confident smile', 'determined training face', 'encouraging look')

props.description: Props Vita is holding or that appear in the scene, relevant to article topic

text_bubble.description: Short quote from the article in Ukrainian (1 sentence max, key takeaway)

color_notes.description: Color palette notes for this specific scene (dominant colors, mood lighting, accents)
